RUN END — DEFEAT, floor 16 (Hexaghost), died at 24 HP. FINAL EVAL: -18 on the death turn (running net ~ -17 from +1 entering the crisis). The kill was a Burn-clog death-spiral: on the Inferno 30 turn I drew 2 Burns + Defend (5 block max) instead of Impervious (buried in discard). With no Weak source and only 3 block cards beyond Impervious, the deck couldn't insure the Inferno turn. Hexaghost was at 31/264 (88% killed) — a damage win, a defense loss. POST-MORTEM: the Flex+Carnage+ T6 burst (264→87 in a few turns) proved my damage was fine; the gap was Inferno survivability. Should have kept BOTH Impervious for the two Inferno turns rather than spending the first on Divider — or taken a Weak source / Flame Barrier earlier.
